## SECTION 4 — India National Updates
An absolutely massive, incredibly terrifying, and unprecedented political and security catastrophe violently exploded in southern India, fundamentally paralyzing two major states. The notoriously brutal, heavily armed bandit Koose Munisamy Veerappan aggressively executed a massive, highly coordinated raid on a farmhouse in Gajanur. In a massive, shocking tactical strike, he successfully and aggressively kidnapped Dr. Rajkumar, the absolute, universally revered superstar and absolute cultural demigod of Kannada cinema. The incredible, massive kidnapping of the 71-year-old icon completely shattered the absolute security apparatus of the nation.

The massive, immediate fallout from Rajkumar's abduction was utterly catastrophic. The entire state of Karnataka erupted into absolute, massive, and highly violent riots. Millions of terrified, furious fans took to the streets of Bangalore, aggressively burning effigies, violently destroying public transport, and fiercely attacking Tamil-owned businesses, deeply threatening to ignite a massive, interstate linguistic war between Karnataka and Tamil Nadu. The Vajpayee government in New Delhi was thrown into an absolute state of massive panic, heavily deploying massive paramilitary forces to forcefully restore order while the state governments frantically prepared for agonizing negotiations with the ruthless bandit.

## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On July 31, 1991, US President George H.W. Bush and Soviet President Mikhail Gorbachev aggressively and officially signed the massive, highly historic Strategic Arms Reduction Treaty (START I) in Moscow. This incredibly monumental bilateral agreement was the absolute, very first massive treaty to mandate deep, aggressive reductions in massive strategic nuclear arsenals, heavily eliminating thousands of intercontinental ballistic missiles and heavily setting the absolute, fundamental stage for the massive, impending conclusion of the Cold War.

On July 31, 1932, the incredibly massive, heavily polarized, and fiercely historic German federal election officially occurred. The National Socialist German Workers' Party (Nazi Party), aggressively led by Adolf Hitler, absolutely dominated the massive electoral contest, winning 230 seats and becoming the absolute largest massive party in the Reichstag. This massive, democratic victory for fascism fundamentally shattered the fragile Weimar Republic, aggressively guaranteeing Hitler's absolute, imminent appointment as Chancellor and the horrific, massive descent into total totalitarian dictatorship.
